message:
feat(engine): add 181 deep integration tests across 5 modules

Add deep enrichment test suites for recently-modified modules:
- outcome_capability_narrowing (43 tests): cascade chains, violation detection, serde, reports
- parser_frontier_evidence (38 tests): corpus completeness, determinism, bundle artifacts
- lowering_parity_evidence (36 tests): inventory determinism, verdict logic, bundle events
- control_plane_policy_diagnostics (36 tests): emitter lifecycle, severity filtering, release blocking
- persistent_cache_contract (28 tests): key material, rollback plans, error codes, bundle emit

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
